title: Capability Version
description: One immutable revision of a capability. Multiple versions can coexist; recommendation routing decides what portion of traffic each receives.

version_id.description: UUID v4 unique per version row.

capability_id.description: References the live capability id in the registry.

status.description: Lifecycle stage. Only one approved version per capability is the recommended default; experimental versions get rollout_percentage traffic.

parent_version_id.description: Previous version this revision was derived from. null for v1.0.0.

examples: Tightened tone guidance, removed redundant framing, swapped to gpt-4.1-mini.

migration_notes.description: How to move users / pipelines from the previous version. Free text.

compatibility_notes.description: What changes operators must know about (breaking inputs, new outputs, etc).

rollout_percentage.description: For experimental status: portion of traffic that should route to this version. Approved version absorbs the remainder.

manifest_snapshot.description: Frozen copy of the capability manifest at this version.

prompt_snapshot.description: Captured prompt body at version time.

revision_id.description: Optimistic-concurrency revision token (Phase 8A). Updated on every persist.
